descriptors: updated music and minor graphic updates from original NES trilogy
occasional graphic downgrades from source material
distinctive_elements: compilation of first three NES games enhanced for 16-bit SNES

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Ninja Gaiden Trilogy
notes: This is a T2 tier compilation release. Sources document it as an enhanced port of the NES trilogy with updated music and minor graphics revisions. No specific sprite dimensions, animation frame counts, or detailed color palette information is available in the provided documentation.
